Localization.Description: Traffic to be analyzed is allowed, denied, or redirected

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Host {event_src.host} allowed HTTP traffic between host {src.host} and host {object.path}
Host {event_src.host} denied HTTP traffic between host {src.host} and host {object.path}
Host {event_src.host} redirected HTTP traffic between host {src.host} and host {object.path}
